reauth_confirm.title: Carrier Auth
reauth_confirm.description: Update the Carrier username or password for {username}. Leave the password blank to keep the saved password.

reconfigure.title: Carrier Auth
reconfigure.description: Update the saved Carrier credentials for {username}. Leave the password blank to keep the saved password.

error.invalid_auth: Login failed. Please use official app to logout and log back in and try again.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to reach Carrier. Try again shortly.

abort.already_configured: This Carrier account is already configured.

data.infinite_holds: Holds are infinite, when off holds are until next scheduled activity
